name: Lich
description: And so the dead will bury the dead. Ethreain, the Lich Hypnotizes an enemy unit, causing it to move towards a point between the Lich and the enemy unit while draining a percentage of its current mana.

abilities.name: Sacrifice
abilities.description: Sacrifices an allied unit and converts its current health to mana restore Lich. The higher Lich's level, the greater the health to mana restore and experience value.

abilities.name: Frost Blast
abilities.description: Blasts the target enemy unit with damaging frost, dealing area damage and slowing movement and attack speed for a duration. The primary target receives both base and area damage.

abilities.name: Frost Shield
abilities.description: Applies a shield around the unit-targeted ally. Deals damage per second and slowing the enemy's movement speed centered around the buff-affected allied unit. Applies all effects of Frost Shield around the Ice Spire and regenerating its health while the ice magic pulsates.

abilities.name: Sinister Gaze
abilities.description: Hypnotizes an enemy unit, causing it to move towards a point between the Lich and the enemy unit while draining a percentage of its current mana.

abilities.name: Ice Spire
abilities.description: The Frog grants the Lich a frozen, pointy, immobile permafrost to aid the Lich's rituals. Does this help the Lich? You be creative about it. This unit does not feel the effects from magical spell damage sources.

abilities.name: Chain Frost
abilities.description: Releases an orb of frost that bounces between nearby enemy units, slowing and subsequently increasing its damage each time it bounces. The projectile does not stop bouncing, and continues to increase in damage per projectile impact.
